metadata.description: Every token accounted for. Context health platform for Claude Code.

plugins.name: allay-state-keeper
plugins.description: Preserves Claude Code context across compactions. Writes checkpoint before compaction wipes context. Auto-restores after compaction.

plugins.name: allay-token-saver
plugins.description: Reduces token usage by compressing verbose tool outputs, blocking duplicate file reads, delta mode for re-reads, and output efficiency instructions.

plugins.name: allay-context-guard
plugins.description: The eyes of Allay. Drift Alert catches Claude spinning in circles. Runway forecasts turns until compaction. Analytics shows per-tool token consumption. Report proves exact savings.
